kept.text:
Num Krok (នំគ្រក់) is a timeless Khmer tradition—crispy on the outside, soft and coconut‑fragrant on the inside. Simple to make and perfect for sharing, it’s a favorite at family gatherings and easy evening snack. More than just a bite, Num Krok brings warmth, conversation, and the comforting taste of home to every table.
#KhmerFood #Tradition #Memory
